title: Senior Software Engineer - Shaadi.com Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Shaadi.com Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shaadi.com Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Pimpri-Chinchwad-based team.

About Shaadi.com Global Group:
Shaadi.com Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com Global Group!
